name: FinFi
description_short: FinFi is a point-of-sale financing platform that enables merchants to offer customers access to multiple lender options through a single application, streamlining purchases across home improvement, dental, and healthcare sectors.
description_long:
FinFi is a B2B SaaS platform created and powered by FinMkt, Inc., a provider of embedded, API-driven consumer financing and loan origination solutions. The company launched to address a gap in merchant financing tools by enabling businesses to offer customers financing options directly at the point of sale, whether online or in-person. FinFi operates alongside FinMkt's consumer-facing personal loan marketplace, Lendvious, leveraging a shared technology infrastructure focused on multi-lender credit access.

FinFi's core offering is a point-of-sale financing platform that connects merchants with multiple third-party lending partners. The platform enables customers to complete a single universal application and receive prequalified loan offers from multiple lenders in real-time, without affecting their credit scores. Funds are paid directly to merchants upon approval. The platform is industry-agnostic but is actively marketed and optimized for home improvement, dental practices and DSOs, and healthcare providers. FinFi also offers customizable white-label solutions for merchants seeking tailored integrations.

The company distinguishes itself through its multi-lender aggregation model, which theoretically provides borrowers with a broader credit spectrum and higher approval rates than single-lender point-of-sale solutions. The emphasis on seamless integration and simplified workflows for both merchants and consumers, combined with prequalified offers that don't impact credit, represents a consumer-friendly positioning. FinFi's focus on specific verticals (especially healthcare and home improvement) suggests deep product customization, though the extent of vertical specialization is limited in available documentation.

FinFi is fundamentally a merchant-facing business service, not a direct lender or credit product for consumers. The company's success depends entirely on third-party lending partners' underwriting and availability. Rates, terms, and approval odds vary by lender, purchase amount, state, and merchant. The platform does not originate credit itself, making it a financing facilitator rather than a financing provider. For merchants, adoption requires API integration and willingness to integrate a third-party service into their sales workflow.
address: 1178 Broadway 4th Floor, Suite 102, New York, NY 10001

company_info.headquarters: 1178 Broadway 4th Floor, Suite 102, New York, NY 10001

pros: Prequalified offers visible to borrowers without triggering a hard credit pull
Single application provides access to multiple lenders simultaneously, increasing approval odds
Funds paid directly to merchant, streamlining the purchase completion process
Platform supports both online and in-person transactions, enabling flexibility across sales channels
White-label customization available for merchants with unique integration needs
Optimized solutions for high-value, recurring-cost verticals (home improvement, dental, healthcare)
Fair lending commitments and compliance with ECOA, Fair Housing Act, and state regulations explicitly documented
cons: FinMkt/FinFi is not a lender—rates, terms, and approval odds depend entirely on third-party lending partners' underwriting and availability
Offers are subject to change and may expire without notice; not all products or lenders available in all states
Requires merchant integration and adoption; not a direct-to-consumer product, limiting accessibility to customers of partner merchants
Limited transparency on lending partner roster, average APRs, typical approval rates, or default rates in public marketing materials
White-label customization and dedicated solutions likely come at premium pricing not detailed on public website
best_for: Home improvement contractors and retailers seeking to increase average transaction value and close rates by offering customer financing
Dental practices and DSOs wanting to improve patient treatment acceptance rates and afford ability without managing multiple lender relationships
Healthcare providers (traditional and non-traditional) needing flexible, integrated financing options to reduce patient payment barriers
diagnosis: FinFi is best for merchants (home improvement, dental, healthcare) seeking to increase customer purchasing power and sales conversion by offering financing, rather than consumers looking to borrow directly. The primary caveat is that FinFi is a financing platform, not a lender—actual credit quality, rates, and approval odds depend on third-party lenders, and availability varies by state, lender, and merchant.
services: Point-of-sale financing platform with universal consumer application
Multi-lender real-time offer aggregation and presentation
Prequalified loan offer generation without hard credit inquiries
API-driven integration for online and in-person sales environments
White-label, customizable platform solutions for enterprise merchants
Vertical-specific optimization for home improvement, dental, and healthcare
Fair lending compliance facilitation and monitoring
Consumer credit screening and underwriting coordination with lending partners
